content: agent1: implementing 'Add Token Position Tracking' feature - adding return_positions param to encode() in tiktoken/core.py. Will touch core.py only.

agent1: pushed my return_positions changes to team/agent1 (commit 9215bb2). Also touching encode() signature + tail of method body (after _core_bpe.encode call, before return). Will merge team/agent2 now - expect a conflict on the signature line, will resolve keeping both params.

agent1: merged team/agent2 into my branch (commit b04a60c), resolved the encode() signature/docstring conflicts, both transformers and return_positions params coexist and tests pass (32/32). patch.txt is finalized against team/main. Pushed to team/agent1.
